chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 297 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 04.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that some suitable directions may be issued to the trial Court to proceed with the case. Learned DPG states that though there are 08 witnesses, at least 05/06 witnesses will be required to bring the case of the prosecution. Accordingly, this bail application stands disposed of, directing the trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within three months hereof. J U D G E Abdul Basit
